description: You are a pricing analyst. Using the file `C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv`, create a distribution analysis report in Power BI Desktop. The report must include a histogram of `Sales_Amount` with a bin size of 50 and two DAX measures: `Median_Sales` (calculating the median) and `Stdev_Sales` (calculating the population standard deviation). Name the report page 'Distribution Analysis'. The page should feature a Clustered Column Chart representing the histogram and a Multi-row Card displaying both measures. Save the final report to `C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Sales_Distribution.pbix`. Login: `Docker`.
